name: Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups non-fat sour cream or yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package instructions.
2. Spread the cooked rice evenly at the bottom of a 9x12-inch baking dish.
3. Sprinkle the chopped onion over the rice.
4. Layer the grated non-fat cheese on top.
5. Add the sliced tomatoes (or yellow squash/zucchini).
6. Top with the remaining non-fat sour cream or yogurt.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
